package perfextra

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "crypto/hmac"
    "crypto/md5"
    "crypto/sha1"
    "crypto/sha256"
    "crypto/sha512"
    "encoding/base64"
    "encoding/hex"
    "encoding/json"
    "fmt"
    "hash/adler32"
    "hash/crc32"
    "hash/crc64"
    "math/rand"
    "net/http"
    "path"
    "path/filepath"
    "runtime"
    "strconv"
    "strings"
    "sync"
    "time"
)

func BytesCompareEqual(a, b []byte) bool { return bytes.Compare(a, b) == 0 }
func BytesCompareNotEqual(a, b []byte) bool { return bytes.Compare(a, b) != 0 }
func BytesIndexContains(a, b []byte) bool { return bytes.Index(a, b) != -1 }
func BytesIndexAnyContainsAny(s []byte) bool { return bytes.IndexAny(s, ",;") != -1 }
func BytesCountContains(s []byte) bool { return bytes.Count(s, []byte("x")) > 0 }

func StringsCompareEqual(a, b string) bool { return strings.Compare(a, b) == 0 }
func StringsCompareNotEqual(a, b string) bool { return strings.Compare(a, b) != 0 }
func StringsIndexAnyContainsAny(s string) bool { return strings.IndexAny(s, ",;") != -1 }
func StringsCountContains(s string) bool { return strings.Count(s, "x") > 0 }

func StringsSplitNZero(s string) string { return strings.SplitN(s, ":", 2)[0] }
func StringsSplitNOne(s string) string { return strings.SplitN(s, ":", 2)[1] }
func BytesSplitNZero(s []byte) []byte { return bytes.SplitN(s, []byte(":"), 2)[0] }
func BytesSplitNOne(s []byte) []byte { return bytes.SplitN(s, []byte(":"), 2)[1] }
func StringsSplitZero(s string) string { return strings.Split(s, ":")[0] }
func StringsSplitOne(s string) string { return strings.Split(s, ":")[1] }
func BytesSplitZero(s []byte) []byte { return bytes.Split(s, []byte(":"))[0] }
func BytesSplitOne(s []byte) []byte { return bytes.Split(s, []byte(":"))[1] }
func StringsSplitAfterNZero(s string) string { return strings.SplitAfterN(s, ":", 2)[0] }
func StringsSplitAfterNOne(s string) string { return strings.SplitAfterN(s, ":", 2)[1] }
func BytesSplitAfterNZero(s []byte) []byte { return bytes.SplitAfterN(s, []byte(":"), 2)[0] }
func BytesSplitAfterNOne(s []byte) []byte { return bytes.SplitAfterN(s, []byte(":"), 2)[1] }
func StringsSplitAfterZero(s string) string { return strings.SplitAfter(s, ":")[0] }
func StringsSplitAfterOne(s string) string { return strings.SplitAfter(s, ":")[1] }
func BytesSplitAfterZero(s []byte) []byte { return bytes.SplitAfter(s, []byte(":"))[0] }
func BytesSplitAfterOne(s []byte) []byte { return bytes.SplitAfter(s, []byte(":"))[1] }

func StringsLowerFold(a, b string) bool { return strings.ToLower(a) == strings.ToLower(b) }
func StringsUpperFold(a, b string) bool { return strings.ToUpper(a) == strings.ToUpper(b) }
func BytesLowerFold(a, b []byte) bool { return bytes.Equal(bytes.ToLower(a), bytes.ToLower(b)) }
func BytesUpperFold(a, b []byte) bool { return bytes.Equal(bytes.ToUpper(a), bytes.ToUpper(b)) }

func WriterWriteBytes(w http.ResponseWriter, s string) {
    _, _ = w.Write([]byte(s))
}

func BuilderWriteStringByte() {
    var builder strings.Builder
    builder.WriteString("/")
}

func BufferWriteStringByte() {
    var buf bytes.Buffer
    buf.WriteString("/")
}

func BuilderWriteRuneByte() {
    var builder strings.Builder
    builder.WriteRune('/')
}

func BufferWriteRuneByte() {
    var buf bytes.Buffer
    buf.WriteRune('/')
}

func BytesReaderFromString(s string) *bytes.Reader { return bytes.NewReader([]byte(s)) }
func StringsReaderFromBytes(b []byte) *strings.Reader { return strings.NewReader(string(b)) }
func BytesBufferStringFromBytes(b []byte) *bytes.Buffer { return bytes.NewBufferString(string(b)) }
func StringsReplaceAllOld(s string) string { return strings.Replace(s, "a", "b", -1) }
func BytesReplaceAllOld(s []byte) []byte { return bytes.Replace(s, []byte("a"), []byte("b"), -1) }
func StringsTrimLeftSpace(s string) string { return strings.TrimLeft(s, " \t\r\n") }
func StringsTrimRightSpace(s string) string { return strings.TrimRight(s, " \t\r\n") }
func BytesTrimLeftSpace(s []byte) []byte { return bytes.TrimLeft(s, " \t\r\n") }
func BytesTrimRightSpace(s []byte) []byte { return bytes.TrimRight(s, " \t\r\n") }

func BufferLenString() int {
    var buf bytes.Buffer
    buf.WriteString("hello")
    return len(buf.String())
}

func BuilderLenString() int {
    var builder strings.Builder
    builder.WriteString("hello")
    return len(builder.String())
}

func BufferTruncateReset() {
    var buf bytes.Buffer
    buf.WriteString("hello")
    buf.Truncate(0)
}

func FilepathBaseOnly(p string) string {
    _, file := filepath.Split(p)
    return file
}

func FilepathDirOnly(p string) string {
    dir, _ := filepath.Split(p)
    return dir
}

func PathBaseOnly(p string) string {
    _, file := path.Split(p)
    return file
}

func PathDirOnly(p string) string {
    dir, _ := path.Split(p)
    return dir
}

func StringsManualPrefix(s, prefix string) bool {
    return len(s) >= len(prefix) && s[:len(prefix)] == prefix
}

func StringsManualSuffix(s, suffix string) bool {
    return len(s) >= len(suffix) && s[len(s)-len(suffix):] == suffix
}

func BytesManualPrefix(s, prefix []byte) bool {
    return len(s) >= len(prefix) && bytes.Equal(s[:len(prefix)], prefix)
}

func BytesManualSuffix(s, suffix []byte) bool {
    return len(s) >= len(suffix) && bytes.Equal(s[len(s)-len(suffix):], suffix)
}

func FormatBool(flag bool) string { return fmt.Sprintf("%t", flag) }
func FormatFloat(v float64) string { return fmt.Sprintf("%f", v) }
func FormatBinary(v int) string { return fmt.Sprintf("%b", v) }
func FormatOctal(v int) string { return fmt.Sprintf("%o", v) }
func FormatHex(v int) string { return fmt.Sprintf("%x", v) }
func FormatQuote(v string) string { return fmt.Sprintf("%q", v) }
func FormatString(v string) string { return fmt.Sprintf("%s", v) }

func FprintBuilder(v string) string {
    var builder strings.Builder
    fmt.Fprint(&builder, v)
    return builder.String()
}

func FprintlnBuilder(v string) string {
    var builder strings.Builder
    fmt.Fprintln(&builder, v)
    return builder.String()
}

func FprintfBuilder(v string) string {
    var builder strings.Builder
    fmt.Fprintf(&builder, "%s", v)
    return builder.String()
}

func FprintBuffer(v string) string {
    var buf bytes.Buffer
    fmt.Fprint(&buf, v)
    return buf.String()
}

func FprintlnBuffer(v string) string {
    var buf bytes.Buffer
    fmt.Fprintln(&buf, v)
    return buf.String()
}

func FprintfBuffer(v string) string {
    var buf bytes.Buffer
    fmt.Fprintf(&buf, "%s", v)
    return buf.String()
}

func FormatIntViaInt64(v int) string { return strconv.FormatInt(int64(v), 10) }

func TimeTick() {
    ticker := time.Tick(time.Second)
    _ = ticker
}

func TimersInLoop(items []int) {
    for range items {
        t := time.NewTimer(time.Second)
        _ = t
    }
}

func TickersInLoop(items []int) {
    for range items {
        t := time.NewTicker(time.Second)
        _ = t
    }
}

func RandSeedPerCall() {
    rand.Seed(time.Now().UnixNano())
}

func RandNewSourcePerCall() {
    _ = rand.NewSource(1)
}

func RandNewSourceNowPerCall() {
    _ = rand.NewSource(time.Now().UnixNano())
}

func RandNewPerCall() {
    _ = rand.New(rand.NewSource(1))
}

func TimeSinceViaSub(start time.Time) time.Duration {
    return time.Now().Sub(start)
}

func TimeUntilViaSub(deadline time.Time) time.Duration {
    return deadline.Sub(time.Now())
}

func DurationNanoZero(d time.Duration) bool {
    return d.Nanoseconds() == 0
}

func RuntimeNumCPUInLoop(items []int) {
    for range items {
        _ = runtime.NumCPU()
    }
}

func RuntimeGOMAXPROCSHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
    runtime.GOMAXPROCS(1)
    _ = w
    _ = r
}

func TimeLoadLocationLoop(items []int) {
    for range items {
        _, _ = time.LoadLocation("UTC")
    }
}

func TimeFixedZoneLoop(items []int) {
    for range items {
        _ = time.FixedZone("UTC", 0)
    }
}

func SyncOnceLoop(items []int) {
    var once sync.Once
    for range items {
        once.Do(func() {})
    }
}

func ContextTimeoutLoop(items []int) {
    for range items {
        ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Second)
        _ = ctx
        cancel()
    }
}

func JsonValidThenUnmarshal(raw []byte) any {
    if !json.Valid(raw) {
        return nil
    }
    var payload any
    _ = json.Unmarshal(raw, &payload)
    return payload
}

func JsonMarshalIndentLoop(items []int) {
    for _, item := range items {
        _, _ = json.MarshalIndent(item, "", "  ")
    }
}

func JsonIndentLoop(items [][]byte) {
    for _, item := range items {
        var out bytes.Buffer
        _ = json.Indent(&out, item, "", "  ")
    }
}

func Base64EncodeLoop(items [][]byte) {
    for _, item := range items {
        _ = base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString(item)
    }
}

func Base64DecodeLoop(items []string) {
    for _, item := range items {
        _, _ = base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(item)
    }
}

func HexEncodeLoop(items [][]byte) {
    for _, item := range items {
        _ = hex.EncodeToString(item)
    }
}

func HexDecodeLoop(items []string) {
    for _, item := range items {
        _, _ = hex.DecodeString(item)
    }
}

func Sha1Loop(items [][]byte) {
    for _, item := range items {
        _ = sha1.Sum(item)
    }
}

func Sha256Loop(items [][]byte) {
    for _, item := range items {
        _ = sha256.Sum256(item)
    }
}

func Sha512Loop(items [][]byte) {
    for _, item := range items {
        _ = sha512.Sum512(item)
    }
}

func Md5Loop(items [][]byte) {
    for _, item := range items {
        _ = md5.Sum(item)
    }
}

func CRC32Loop(items [][]byte) {
    for _, item := range items {
        _ = crc32.ChecksumIEEE(item)
    }
}

func CRC64Loop(items [][]byte, table *crc64.Table) {
    for _, item := range items {
        _ = crc64.Checksum(item, table)
    }
}

func Adler32Loop(items [][]byte) {
    for _, item := range items {
        _ = adler32.Checksum(item)
    }
}

func HMACLoop(items [][]byte) {
    for _, item := range items {
        _ = hmac.New(sha256.New, item)
    }
}

func ReplacerLoop(items []string) {
    for _, item := range items {
        _ = strings.NewReplacer("a", "b").Replace(item)
    }
}
